and FFS
 TOBA_MEDICARE Tobacco Use Disorders - Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 TOBA_COMBINED_EVER Tobacco Use Disorders - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 TOBA_MEDICAID_EVER Tobacco Use Disorders - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 TOBA_MEDICARE_EVER Tobacco Use Disorders - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date
